description: Style NoteThe best part about catwalk sandals is you can use them both in a casual set up or for an evening in town. These mini wedge heels will definitely make you stand out and the colours have the power to attract the right attention!Product DetailsBlunt toed mini-wedge sandal with a forefoot strap and an ankle loop (also has a heel cup)Bead work around the forefoot and the midfootHas a zipper at the heel collarTPU outsole with patterned groovesHeel: 1.5"Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
